falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises above the 2024 August high by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest a bullish trend, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds the 20-day average by 50% and sustains above this level for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume would indicate strong buying pressure, refuting the HOLD signal and suggesting a trend reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the bottom pattern match and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
